unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Mac
title: Calendar and Reminders
drDigitalIntro: The Calendar app lets you schedule appointments, birthdays, and events. Set reminders so you never forget a doctor's appointment. Events sync across your iPhone, iPad, and Mac through iCloud. The Reminders app is for task lists — grocery shopping, things to do. Use both together to stay organized. Creating a simple digital calendar habit takes only a few minutes a day and saves a lot of stress.

playgroundTask.question: You want to make sure you don't forget your dentist appointment on Thursday. What's the best tool for this?

options.text: Write the time in a text file and hope you find it
Add it to the Calendar app with a reminder alert the day before
Take a screenshot of this message

drDigitalSuccess: The Calendar app with a reminder alert will notify you automatically — no need to remember to check anything.
drDigitalHint: Which tool is specifically designed to remind you of future events at the right time?
